game_name: The Amazing Spider-Man vs. The Kingpin

danger_signals.visual_form: Sprite animation and onscreen placement of hostile characters
danger_signals.meaning: Immediate threat to player; collision results in damage

danger_signals.visual_form: Spikes, falling platforms, moving obstacles rendered in level geometry
danger_signals.meaning: Collision with these elements causes damage or death

danger_signals.visual_form: Large, distinctive sprite with aggressive animation patterns; screen focus shift
danger_signals.meaning: High-difficulty confrontation; defeat required to progress

danger_signals.visual_form: Spider-Man sprite flashing or color shift; HUD health bar reduction
danger_signals.meaning: Player character taking damage; imminent death risk if health reaches zero

safety_signals.visual_form: Collectable sprites (health restoration items, power-ups) placed in level
safety_signals.meaning: Resource acquisition; health recovery or temporary invulnerability

safety_signals.visual_form: Open platforming spaces without visible enemies or hazards
safety_signals.meaning: Safe passage opportunity; room to maneuver and plan next action

safety_signals.visual_form: Designated level areas or visual markers indicating progress save points
safety_signals.meaning: Player progress secured; death returns to this location rather than level start

faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Urban New York settings; skyscraper and rooftop environments aligned with Spider-Man's territory

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Thugs, henchmen, and criminal operatives rendered as distinct enemy sprites throughout levels
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Industrial, warehouse, and criminal hideout locations; interiors suggesting organized crime operations

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: City environments with moderate enemy density; cleaner, more navigable spaces
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Enemy encounters are introductory in difficulty; henchmen follow basic patrol patterns

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Darker environments, warehouse/industrial settings; increased visual clutter and hazard placement
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: More aggressive enemy types appear; hazard frequency increases; boss encounters become more frequent

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Kingpin's headquarters or climactic location; heavily fortified visual design; maximum environmental density
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: All enemy types present; pattern complexity maximal; final boss appears with full sprite animation set

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Spider-Man sprite may flash or display distress animation
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Increased enemy aggression; tighter timing windows on platforming sections

environmental_storytelling.example: Movement from rooftop and street-level environments into criminal infrastructure (warehouses, hideouts) visually demonstrates Spider-Man's pursuit of Kingpin deeper into criminal underworld
Street-level henchmen differ visually from warehouse guards and laboratory operatives, suggesting hierarchical organization and specialized criminal operations
Industrial machinery, electrical traps, and structural dangers in later levels suggest Kingpin's base is an active criminal operation rather than static location

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Walks set patrol path; sprite animation loops; no immediate threat posture
Changes direction toward player; animation quickens; begins pursuit or attack patterns
Large sprite enters screen; unique animation set; music/visual focus change signals critical encounter
Cyclical attack patterns; sprite displays damage state changes; arena boundaries enforced through visual design

notes: This 1991 Genesis platformer uses classic 16-bit visual language to communicate danger and progression. Spider-Man's iconic red/blue costume provides immediate player identification. Enemy and environment variety signals narrative escalation from street-level crime to organized criminal infrastructure. The game lacks sophisticated UI but relies on sprite animation, color shifts, and environmental design to communicate state changes. Danger is primarily signaled through enemy presence and hazard placement rather than visual warning systems. Safety emerges through level design (open spaces) and item placement.
